# LPR research landscape

Every published paper is counted once under the branch that best represents its primary contribution. Reviewed method taxonomy assignments remain multi-label facets, so their counts may overlap; the landscape counts below are additive.

```mermaid
flowchart TB
  root["LiDAR Place Recognition<br/>74 papers"]
  n_global_retrieval["Global retrieval<br/>58 papers"]

  n_global_retrieval_learned_multimodal["Multimodal learning<br/>4 papers"]
  n_local_structural["Local, segment and semantic structure<br/>8 papers"]
  n_local_structural_segment_object["Segment / object matching<br/>4 papers"]
  n_local_structural_semantic_graph["Semantic graphs<br/>3 papers"]

  n_temporal_map["Temporal and map-assisted<br/>5 papers"]

  n_temporal_map_map_assisted["Map / submap-assisted<br/>3 papers"]
  n_emerging_cross_domain["Emerging and cross-domain<br/>3 papers"]

  n_emerging_cross_domain_lifelong_uncertainty["Lifelong / uncertainty<br/>2 papers"]
  root --> n_global_retrieval
  n_global_retrieval --> n_global_retrieval_handcrafted
  n_global_retrieval_handcrafted --> n_global_retrieval_handcrafted_projection_context

  n_global_retrieval_learned --> n_global_retrieval_learned_projection
```

## Primary branch totals

| Branch | Papers | Share |
| --- | ---: | ---: |
| Global retrieval | 58 | 78.4% |
| Local, segment and semantic structure | 8 | 10.8% |
| Temporal and map-assisted | 5 | 6.8% |
| Emerging and cross-domain | 3 | 4.1% |

## Papers by primary branch

<a id="branch-global-retrieval-handcrafted-projection-context"></a>
### Projection / context (9)

Recognition through segment or object descriptors and associations.

- **[On the descriptive power of LiDAR intensity images for segment-based loop closing in 3-D SLAM](papers/on-the-descriptive-power-of-lidar-intensity-images-for-segment-based-loop-closing-in-3-d-slam.md)** Â· IROS Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Segment / object matching` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2108.01383)
- **[Seed: A Segmentation-Based Egocentric 3D Point Cloud Descriptor for Loop Closure Detection](papers/seed-a-segmentation-based-egocentric-3d-point-cloud-descriptor-for-loop-closure-detection.md)** Â· IROS Â· `conference` Â· `Segment / object matching` Â· `Handcrafted` Â· [Paper](https://doi.org/10.1109/iros45743.2020.9341517)
- **[SegMap: Segment-based mapping and localization using data-driven descriptors](papers/segmap-segment-based-mapping-and-localization-using-data-driven-descriptors.md)** Â· IJRR Â· `conference` Â· `Segment / object matching` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://doi.org/10.1177/0278364919863090)
- **[SegMatch: Segment based place recognition in 3D point clouds](papers/segmatch-segment-based-place-recognition-in-3d-point-clouds.md)** Â· ICRA Â· `conference` Â· `Segment / object matching` Â· `Handcrafted` Â· [Paper](https://doi.org/10.1109/icra.2017.7989618) Â· [Code](https://github.com/ethz-asl/segmap)

<a id="branch-local-structural-semantic-graph"></a>
### Semantic graphs (3)

Graph-based recognition using semantic entities and relations.

- **[SGLC: Semantic Graph-Guided Coarse-Fine-Refine Full Loop Closing for LiDAR SLAM](papers/sglc-semantic-graph-guided-coarse-fine-refine-full-loop-closing-for-lidar-slam.md)** Â· arXiv Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Semantic graphs` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2407.08106) Â· [Code](https://github.com/nubot-nudt/SGLC)
- **[BoxGraph: Semantic Place Recognition and Pose Estimation from 3D LiDAR](papers/boxgraph-semantic-place-recognition-and-pose-estimation-from-3d-lidar.md)** Â· IROS Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Semantic graphs` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2206.15154)
- **[SRNet: A 3D Scene Recognition Network using Static Graph and Dense Semantic Fusion](papers/srnet-a-3d-scene-recognition-network-using-static-graph-and-dense-semantic-fusion.md)** Â· Computer Graphics Forum Â· `conference` Â· `Semantic graphs` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://doi.org/10.1111/cgf.14146)

<a id="branch-local-structural-semantic-descriptor"></a>
### Semantic descriptors (1)

Semantic representations without an explicit relational graph.

- **[SSC: Semantic Scan Context for Large-Scale Place Recognition](papers/ssc-semantic-scan-context-for-large-scale-place-recognition.md)** Â· IROS Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Semantic descriptors` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2107.00382) Â· [Code](https://github.com/lilin-hitcrt/SSC)

<a id="branch-temporal-map-sequence"></a>
### Sequence-based recognition (2)

Ordered scan sequences and learned or handcrafted temporal context.

- **[SeqOT: A Spatialâ€“Temporal Transformer Network for Place Recognition Using Sequential LiDAR Data](papers/seqot-a-spatial-temporal-transformer-network-for-place-recognition-using-sequential-lidar-data.md)** Â· TIE Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Sequence-based recognition` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2209.07951) Â· [Code](https://github.com/BIT-MJY/SeqOT)
- **[SeqLPD: Sequence Matching Enhanced Loop-Closure Detection Based on Large-Scale Point Cloud Description for Self-Driving Vehicles](papers/seqlpd-sequence-matching-enhanced-loop-closure-detection-based-on-large-scale-point-cloud-description-for-self-driving-v.md)** Â· IROS Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Sequence-based recognition` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/1904.13030)

<a id="branch-temporal-map-map-assisted"></a>
### Map / submap-assisted (3)

Explicit scan-to-map, submap, or persistent-map recognition.

- **[Fast and Accurate Deep Loop Closing and Relocalization for Reliable LiDAR SLAM](papers/fast-and-accurate-deep-loop-closing-and-relocalization-for-reliable-lidar-slam.md)** Â· TRO Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Map / submap-assisted` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2309.08086) Â· [Code](https://github.com/nubot-nudt/LCR-Net)
- **[RING++: Roto-Translation Invariant Gram for Global Localization on a Sparse Scan Map](papers/ring-roto-translation-invariant-gram-for-global-localization-on-a-sparse-scan-map.md)** Â· TRO Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Map / submap-assisted` Â· `Handcrafted` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2210.05984)
- **[EgoNN: Egocentric Neural Network for Point Cloud Based 6DoF Relocalization at the City Scale](papers/egonn-egocentric-neural-network-for-point-cloud-based-6dof-relocalization-at-the-city-scale.md)** Â· RAL Â· `conference` Â· `Map / submap-assisted` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://doi.org/10.1109/lra.2021.3133593) Â· [Code](https://github.com/jac99/Egonn)

<a id="branch-emerging-cross-domain-cross-source"></a>
### Cross-source / cross-view (1)

Recognition across sensing sources, platforms, viewpoints, or map domains.

- **[CrossLoc3D: Aerial-Ground Cross-Source 3D Place Recognition](papers/crossloc3d-aerial-ground-cross-source-3d-place-recognition.md)** Â· ICCV Â· `arxiv_preprint` Â· `Cross-source / cross-view` Â· `Learning` Â· [Paper](https://arxiv.org/abs/2303.17778) Â· [Code](https://github.com/rayguan97/crossloc3d)

<a id="branch-emerging-cross-domain-lifelong-uncertainty"></a>
### Lifelong / uncertainty (2)

Continual adaptation, novelty, memory, or calibrated uncertainty.
